subject: [PATCH v3 2/8] io_uring/kbuf: support kernel-managed buffer rings in buffer selection

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch adds support for kernel-managed buffer rings in the io_uring/kbuf module. It modifies the io_br_sel struct to separate address and value fields, allowing for error checking on kernel addresses. The patch also introduces auto-committing of selected kernel-managed buffers. This change enables the use of kernel-managed buffers with io_uring, improving performance and efficiency.
